chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special Customs Reference Applications 823, 824, 825, 826, 827 & 828 of 2019 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection No.25 2. For hearing of main case 3. For hearing of CMA No.4034/2019 03.10.2025 Mr. Muhammad Khalil Dogar, advocate for the applicant Mr. Madan Lal, advocate for respondent Under instructions learned counsel for the applicant does not press these reference applications which are dismissed as withdrawn. Office is instructed to place copy of this order in connected matters. A copy of this order may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969 Judge Judge Amjad
